title: Human Guinea Pig
overview: The year is 2007. In a secret U.S. lab, the young Pschiccer Keith Evans is being experimented on for the purpose of creating super soldiers. Upon his escape from the facilities, Keith meets Burn Griffith and the pairs fate start to intertwine...

title: Noah's World
overview: Three years later, Burn attempts to discover what has become of Keith. His main lead arrives when a mysterious voice telepathically calls for the meeting of all Psychiccers...
